Links: [{"title":"Card - CSS - MDN Web Docs - Mozilla","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/How_to/Layout_cookbook/Card"},{"title":"20+ CSS Card Layouts: Free Code Snippets & Examples","url":"https://freefrontend.com/css-card-layouts/"},{"title":"Expandable Sections Within a CSS Grid | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/expandable-sections-within-a-css-grid/"},{"title":"Expanding Grid Cards with View Transitions – Chris Coyier","url":"https://chriscoyier.net/2023/04/11/expanding-grid-cards-with-view-transitions/"},{"title":"Expanding CSS Cards with Grid Layout | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@mishraishika209/expanding-css-grid-cards-e1b17fba3ebe"},{"title":"Toggle Between Grid and List View in React | by Celeste Layne | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@layne_celeste/toggle-between-grid-and-list-view-in-react-731df62b829e"},{"title":"css-grid: toggle card layout","url":"https://codepen.io/pumax/pen/xxxQdMg"},{"title":"1157 Cards: CSS & Tailwind","url":"https://uiverse.io/cards"},{"title":"PatternFly • Card view","url":"https://www.patternfly.org/patterns/card-view/design-guidelines/"},{"title":"10 Powerful Card CSS Examples - layerspilot","url":"https://layerspilot.com/10-powerful-card-css-examples/"}]

Based on the search results, I found relevant information about CSS grid card layouts with view toggling patterns. Here's what the web search revealed:

## Key Findings

**Card Layout Patterns with Toggle Views:**

A card view is a grid of cards in a gallery to facilitate browsing, typically used to present data set summaries, allowing users to drill down into any card to see more detailed content. Card views can toggle into a table or list view, which is a common UX pattern for managing different density levels.

**Grid Implementation Techniques:**

Dynamic grid-spacing configurations are engineered natively using CSS Grid with repeat(auto-fit, minmax()) structures, preventing visual overlap without breaking column flow.

**React Toggle Implementation:**

The process involves changing the layout view from grid to list and back using conditional rendering in React, a few lines of custom CSS and Bootstrap classes. A boolean can toggle between the grid and list view, where the default value (true) means it's in grid view, and if it's false, it will be in list view.

**Modern Card Design (2025):**

A modern CSS card design for websites 2025 combines clarity, interactivity, and responsiveness in one elegant package.

**Open-Source Resources:**

Uiverse's library provides open-source, responsive cards for web and mobile applications, browsable from minimalistic to feature-rich styles. Additionally, PatternFly provides card view design guidelines as an open-source design system resource.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
